_comment: Curated seed of browser-runnable models. The freshness routine extends this from the HF API. status: built = has a models/<slug>/ page; pending = catalogued, page not built yet.

models.name: SmolVLM (vision-language)
models.blurb: Describe, answer questions about, and reason over an image with a tiny VLM.
models.unlocks: In-browser visual Q&A, alt-text, and screenshot understanding with zero server cost.

models.name: Whisper (speech-to-text)
models.blurb: Transcribe speech from the mic or a file, with word timestamps.
models.unlocks: Private, offline dictation, captions, and voice commands — audio never leaves the device.

models.name: Kokoro (text-to-speech)
models.blurb: High-quality speech synthesis with multiple voices, fully local.
models.unlocks: Natural narration and accessibility read-aloud with no API keys or per-character billing.

models.name: Qwen2.5 0.5B (chat LLM)
models.blurb: A small instruct LLM that streams tokens locally with sampling controls.
models.unlocks: Private chat, structured extraction, and on-device agents with no inference bill.

models.name: Llama 3.2 1B (WebLLM chat)
models.blurb: A capable 1B chat model running on MLC's WebGPU engine, fully local.
models.unlocks: Private ChatGPT-style assistants, on-device RAG, and offline agents with no server or API bill.

models.name: CLIP (zero-shot image)
models.blurb: Classify an image against ANY labels you type — no training.
models.unlocks: Custom, on-the-fly image moderation, tagging, and search with labels you invent at runtime.

models.name: Depth Anything v2 (monocular depth)
models.blurb: Turn any single photo into a depth map, live.
models.unlocks: 3D parallax, background blur, and AR occlusion from an ordinary 2D image.

models.name: RMBG-1.4 (background removal)
models.blurb: Cut the subject out of any photo, entirely in the browser.
models.unlocks: Instant private background removal for avatars, product shots, and stickers — no upload.

models.name: DETR (object detection)
models.blurb: Detect and box objects in an image or webcam feed.
models.unlocks: On-device counting, redaction, and scene understanding with no camera stream leaving the page.

models.name: OWLv2 (open-vocabulary detection)
models.blurb: Detect any object you describe in free text — no fixed class list, no retraining.
models.unlocks: Bespoke on-device detection from a text box: custom inventory, inspection, and visual search with nothing uploaded.

models.name: Swin2SR (2× super-resolution)
models.blurb: Upscale a small or compressed image 2× and reconstruct real detail.
models.unlocks: Private, free, offline image enhancement — sharper thumbnails, rescued compressions, restored photos — with no upscaling service.

models.name: SlimSAM (segment anything)
models.blurb: Click a point, get a precise mask of whatever you clicked.
models.unlocks: Interactive cut-out, smart selection, and annotation tools without a server round-trip.

models.name: all-MiniLM-L6 (text embeddings)
models.blurb: Turn text into vectors for semantic search and clustering.
models.unlocks: Private semantic search, dedup, and recommendation that runs in the tab with no vector DB.

models.name: DistilBERT SST-2 (sentiment)
models.blurb: Score text as positive/negative, with the token-level attributions.
models.unlocks: Live, private moderation and feedback triage as the user types — no PII leaves the device.

models.name: DistilBERT SQuAD (question answering)
models.blurb: Extract the exact answer span for a question from a passage.
models.unlocks: Grounded answers from your own documents — FAQ bots and on-device RAG that can't hallucinate facts.

models.name: MS MARCO MiniLM (cross-encoder reranker)
models.blurb: Rerank passages by reading each query–passage pair together for real relevance.
models.unlocks: Two-stage search and better RAG — cross-encoder precision on a shortlist, fully on-device.

models.name: DeBERTa-v3 (zero-shot classification)
models.blurb: Classify text against labels you invent at run time — no training.
models.unlocks: Intent routing, ticket triage, and flexible tagging with custom labels — edit categories, never retrain.

models.name: Florence-2 (vision foundation)
models.blurb: One model, many vision tasks: caption, detect, segment, OCR — via task prompts.
models.unlocks: A single tiny download that does captioning, grounding, OCR and region description on-device.

models.name: DistilBART CNN (summarization)
models.blurb: Summarize long text into a short abstractive summary, streaming as it generates.
models.unlocks: Private, offline TL;DRs of docs, emails, and transcripts — no API key or per-call billing.

models.name: M2M100 418M (translation)
models.blurb: Translate directly between any of 100 languages — no English pivot — fully on-device.
models.unlocks: Private, offline translation and localisation drafts across 100 languages with no server.

models.name: all-MiniLM-L6-v2
models.blurb: sentence-similarity model — see the model card.
models.unlocks: TODO: filled from the model card at build time.

models.name: BERT base (fill-mask)
models.blurb: Hide a word behind [MASK] and BERT ranks what belongs there — with the exact logits.
models.unlocks: Private on-device autocomplete, knowledge probing and bias auditing with no prompt engineering or API bill.

models.name: bge-small-en-v1.5 (sentence similarity)
models.blurb: Retrieval-grade sentence embeddings — rank text by meaning, stronger than MiniLM.
models.unlocks: On-device semantic search, dedup, clustering, and retrieve-then-rerank with no vector DB or API bill.

models.name: FaceLandmarker (MediaPipe)
models.blurb: Lay a 478-point mesh over any face and read its 52 live expression blendshapes plus head pose, from a photo or webcam.
models.unlocks: On-device avatars and VTubing, attention/drowsiness cues, and beauty AR — ARKit-style face blendshapes in the browser, no native SDK.

models.name: HandLandmarker (MediaPipe)
models.blurb: Plot all 21 landmarks on every hand from a photo or live webcam, with handedness.
models.unlocks: Touchless gesture UIs, sign-language tools, and air-drawing — real hand tracking on-device, no depth camera or SDK.

models.name: PoseLandmarker (MediaPipe)
models.blurb: Plot a 33-point body skeleton with per-joint visibility from a photo or live webcam.
models.unlocks: On-device fitness form checks, rep counting, motion control, and pose-match games — no Kinect, no cloud vision API.

models.name: GestureRecognizer (MediaPipe)
models.blurb: Name the hand gesture (👍 thumbs up, ✌️ victory, ✋ open palm, ✊ fist…) with a confidence score, plus the 21 hand landmarks, from a photo or webcam.
models.unlocks: Touchless UI controls, presentation and kiosk remotes, and gesture games — a named gesture becomes a ready-made button, on-device with no depth camera.
